title: Store verified semantAH usefulness audit in Bureau

execution.summary: Turn the verified/falsified audit into a durable Bureau audit artifact linked to the RepoBrief evidence.

acceptance.assertion: docs/audits/semantah-usefulness-audit-v1.md exists and separates verified, falsified, and open claims.
The audit names the RepoBrief bundle evidence or explicitly records that the bundle is not yet available.
The audit does not claim runtime correctness or retrieval usefulness without smoke/evaluation evidence.
